sections.title: Introduction
sections.body_md: Walkthrough of the synthetic Demo Refactor Plan: three phases, two open blockers (DOC-100, TICKET-101), and a halt criterion for the rollout.

sections.title: Phase 1 — Test harness
sections.body_md:
Establish characterization tests before any rewrite.

:::callout {type=warn}
Nothing in Phase 2 starts until Phase 1 is green on CI.
:::

sections.title: Phase 2 — Provider isolation
sections.body_md: Wrap the third-party SDK behind an internal contract.

sections.title: Phase 3 — Rollout
sections.body_md: Experiment configs at 5% → 25% → 100% with halt criterion: error rate > 0.5% over 1 hour.

sections.title: Blockers
sections.body_md:
- DOC-100 — onboarding wiki update pending docs team.
- TICKET-101 — pipeline schema sign-off.

sections.title: Risks
sections.body_md:
1. Provider rate limits during isolation.
2. Experiment skew if user IDs are hashed inconsistently.

final_quiz.question: Which phase ships first?
final_quiz.explanation: Phase 1 (test harness) is mandatory before any rewrite.

glossary.definition: An automatic threshold that pauses or rolls back a rollout when exceeded.
